steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$x^2 + 2x = 72$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $-1 + \sqrt{73}$.

steps.title: Complete the square
steps.content: Add $1$ to both sides of $x^{2}+2x=72$ so the left becomes a perfect square: $$(x+1)^{2}=73.$$

steps.title: Solve and match
steps.content: Take square roots: $x+1=\pm\sqrt{73}$, so $x=-1\pm\sqrt{73}$. The choice given is $-1+\sqrt{73}$. That matches the correct answer.
